text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm sorry to say that I failed to achieve
first place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But I was able to unleash all the power I currently
have, and for that reason, I've no regrets.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What are your thoughts on today's result,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: You did well to place that high.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Your assistance has contributed a
great deal to my being able to finish today's race
without any regrets.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall devote myself to seizing first place in the
next race. Please continue to advise me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...! One must always aim higher... Yes, that's an
important lesson. I shall take it to heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I believe that my current weaknesses became
quite evident during today's race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please assist me in creating a training regimen
that will put us in good stead for the next race. I
look forward to your instruction.
